title: Update ccp16-hop.json description and remove all placeholder strings after regeneration
description: Ensure description references correct spec line, FNV basis 0x811c9dc5, independent oracle from hash_32.json, little-endian epoch concat, no 'computed via' or project-LICHEN-eirg/vhvj legacy refs. Match style of ccp16.json and hash_32.json.
